name: qdrant-codebase-query
description: Semantic code search for AI assistants — continuously indexes your codebase into Qdrant and exposes vector search as an MCP tool.

QDRANT_API_KEY.description: Qdrant API key (leave empty for local instances)

ROOT_PATH.description: Absolute path to the repository to index

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Perform semantic vector search over the indexed codebase

tools.name: index_codebase
tools.description: Trigger a full re-index of the repository
